use_codes.desc: TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE
A METHOD OF INCREASING THE TESTOSTERONE BLOOD LEVEL OF A PERSON IN NEED THEREOF
A METHOD OF INCREASING THE TESTOSTERONE BLOOD LEVEL OF AN ADULT MALE SUBJECT IN NEED THEREOF
A METHOD OF TRANSDERMALLY DELIVERING TESTOSTERONE
A METHOD OF TRANSDERMAL ADMINISTRATION OF A PHYSIOLOGICALLY ACTIVE AGENT TO A SUBJECT.

indications.text:
AXIRON is indicated for replacement therapy in males for conditions associated with a deficiency or absence of
endogenous testosterone.
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to conditions such as cryptorchidism,
bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing testis syndrome...

AXIRON is an androgen indicated for replacement therapy in males for conditions associated with a deficiency or
absence of endogenous testosterone.
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to conditions such as cryptorchidism,
bilateral torsion, orchitis, vanishing tes...
